element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player chooses 3 standard gadgets + 2 from list before each stage
Controls based on move lists and directional sequences
Four secret gadgets unlocked through progression

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Sustained tension with minimal relief windows; sluggish response timing creates friction in tension-release cycles

spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Hidden blueprint gadgets suggest optional discovery mechanics

difficulty_curve.early_game: Moderate; introduces basic combat mechanics and gadget selection
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Escalating; continuous enemy encounters, increasing pressure
difficulty_curve.late_game: Severe spike; Stage 3 introduces hard time limit, no continues available
notable_spikes: Stage 3: Introduces time limit constraint (criticized as frustrating by reviewers)
Overall difficulty described as frustrating with inadequate difficulty progression

notable_level_patterns.description: Before each level, player selects 3 standard gadgets + 2 from available list, creating resource management decision point
Levels feature continuous enemy spawning with escalating difficulty; defeated enemies continue spawning until stage completion
Stage 3 introduces hard time limit, forcing faster combat execution and creating sustained tension without relief

sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Batman Forever (SNES)
